summary: Verified bug fix for side-toggle filtering on EVERYTHING tab in InventoryView. Created Corvo, added mundane 'Sword' and magic 'Spark', toggled sides and confirmed correct filtering. Regression checks on paste-bar-copy-btn and currency-strip also passed.
passed: localStorage cleared, Corvo character created and opened
Default side=mundane and EVERYTHING tab active
Mundane 'Sword' created and visible on mundane EVERYTHING
After toggling to MAGIC, 'Sword' is hidden (bug fix verified)
Magic 'Spark' created and visible on magic EVERYTHING
Toggling to MUNDANE shows only 'Sword', hides 'Spark'
Toggling back to MAGIC shows only 'Spark', hides 'Sword'
Regression: paste-bar-copy-btn renders and clicks successfully (toast 'Copied to bar' shown)
Regression: currency-strip renders for both sides
notes: Non-blocking React warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' (accessibility hint, not a bug).
